title: Small Stairs Updated
body:
The mod adds some small stairs.
Add a 1/3 size stairs. It doesn't take up much space, so you can move it smoothly if you install it after mining the stairs.
1.17 to 1.19.2 are supported, and 1.16 is under experimentation.
Works with both Fabric and Forge.



1.12.2: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smallstairs
1.7.10: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/small-stairs


This mod is based on Sayo's "SmallStairs125　小階段MOD".
![SmallStairs](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/505/512/310/172/2022-10-10_12.png) origin: https://web.archive.org/web/20180927195210/http://minecraft125user.nisfan.net/forum/viewtopic.php?f=11&t=147

(This is a forum archive, created in 1.2.5, but no longer available for download.)
